query:
-- 2. 创建供应商（戴维斯）
INSERT INTO material_suppliers (name, code, categoryId, contactPerson, contactPhone, contactEmail, address, notes, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT '戴维斯', 'DAV', id, '张三', '13800138000', 'davis@example.com', '广东省佛山市', '优质布料供应商', 'active', NOW(), NOW()
FROM material_categories WHERE code = 'fabric' LIMIT 1;
